product: Gemini 3 Flash now available as a Databricks-hosted model
tagline: Gemini 3 Flash is now available as a Databricks hosted model.
what_it_does: Gemini 3 Flash is now available as a Databricks hosted model. This model offers speed and scale without compromising quality, with advanced multimodal capabilities for complex video analysis, data extraction, and visual Q&As. This article describes the state of the art open models that are supported by Databricks Foundation Model APIs.
why_it_matters: This model offers speed and scale without compromising quality, with advanced multimodal capabilities for complex video analysis, data extraction, and visual Q&As.
plain_summary: Gemini 3 Flash is now available as a Databricks hosted model. This model offers speed and scale without compromising quality, with advanced multimodal capabilities for complex video analysis, data extraction, and visual Q&As.
key_takeaway: Gemini 3 Flash is now available as a Databricks hosted model.
